presetDetail.title: Scoring Notes
presetDetail.plan1: Plan 1 is chosen by highest s1, focusing on conflict safety and schedule stability.
presetDetail.plan2: Plan 2 is chosen by highest s2, focusing on weekday concentration and rhythm.
presetDetail.plan3: Plan 3 prioritizes s3 and keeps diversity from Plan 1 as a fallback option.
